# Virtual file system node implementation (2026-03-13 05:21Z)

_**User**_

You are implementing Task 3 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 3: 虚拟 FS — 节点与树类型定义**

1. In src/vfs.rs (at the top, before normalize_path or in a logical place), add:

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
pub enum Node {
    Dir { name: String, children: Vec<Node> },
    File { name: String, content: Vec<u8> },
}

impl Node {
    pub fn name(&self) -> &str {
        match self {
            Node::Dir { name, .. } => name,
            Node::File { name, .. } => name,
        }
    }
    pub fn is_dir(&self) -> bool { matches!(self, Node::Dir { .. }) }
    pub fn is_file(&self) -> bool { matches!(self, Node::File { .. }) }
}

2. Ensure normalize_path remains and compiles. Run: cargo build

3. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): Node enum Dir/File"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell

Report: what you added, build result, commit hash.
